page_content:
Credit Only Granted for: EDCI661 or TLPL645.

Formerly: EDCI661.

TLPL646 Linguistics in Education (3 Credits)

Provides teachers and educational researchers with the theoretical and technical knowledge of linguistics necessary to engage effectively in their fields.

TLPL647 Diagnostic Reading Assessment and Instruction (3 Credits) Prepares individuals to be proficient, classroom-based assessors

of student literacy learning and development by examining literacy assessment theory, materials, and procedures and the use of assessment to inform instruction.
